section.heading: Space weather benchmarks
section.chapeau: The interagency working group established under section 60601(c) shall periodically review and update the benchmarks described in the report of the National Science and Technology Council entitled “Space Weather Phase 1 Benchmarks” and dated June 2018, as necessary, based on—

paragraph.content: any significant new data or advances in scientific understanding that become available; or
the evolving needs of entities impacted by space weather phenomena.
